FNS27時間テレビ にほんのれきし アニメ

data.title: FNS 27-Jikan TV: Nihon no Rekishi Anime
data.title_japanese: FNS27時間テレビ にほんのれきし アニメ
data.synopsis: Special animated corners part of FNS 27-Jikan TV: Nihon no Rekishi that aired on Fuji TV. The corners feature characters from Chibi Maruko-chan, Dragon Ball Super, Kochira Katsushikaku Kameari Kouenmae Hashutsujo, and One Piece as they explore the history of Japan's from the Paleolithic to Heisei period.

titles.title: Gorilla no Kami kara Kago sareta Reijou wa Ouritsu Kishidan de Kawaigarareru
Who Was Blessed by the Gorilla God
Is Adored in the Royal Knight Order
ゴリラの神から加護された令嬢は王立騎士団で可愛がられる

data.title: Gorilla no Kami kara Kago sareta Reijou wa Ouritsu Kishidan de Kawaigarareru
data.title_japanese: ゴリラの神から加護された令嬢は王立騎士団で可愛がられる
title_synonyms: Who Was Blessed by the Gorilla God
Is Adored in the Royal Knight Order
data.synopsis:
In a world where individuals receive blessings from various animal gods at the age of sixteen, Sophia Riller, a timid count's daughter, unexpectedly receives the blessing of the "Gorilla God"—said to be the strongest in combat. Though she longs for a peaceful school life, her rare and powerful ability attracts the attention of the Royal Knights, who scout her as an apprentice knight. Despite her efforts to hide her overwhelming strength, she can't help but stand out. Meanwhile, the promising young knights around her watch over her with kindness.

(Source: MAL News)

In the year 2050, a man and his granddaughter catch a fish full of plastic, a result of pollution created decades earlier.

titles.title: Zongmen Li Chule Wo Dou Shi Wodi
Everyone in the Sect Except Me is an Undercover Agent
宗门里除了我都是卧底

data.title: Zongmen Li Chule Wo Dou Shi Wodi
data.title_japanese: 宗门里除了我都是卧底
title_synonyms: Everyone in the Sect Except Me is an Undercover Agent
data.synopsis:
The legendary hacker was chased to death by the system's AI in order to save humanity, and unexpectedly became the leader of the first sect in another world. However, in order to deal with the situation of all undercover agents in the sect and the system crisis that came with it, Chen Ning just wanted to keep a low profile and wait and see, have a look. But like a cone in the bag, even though he was cold-faced and unparalleled and cared about the world, he was still among thousands of flowers, and each one was touched. Finally, with the help of the system agent Jiang Que, Chen Ning's domineering body shook, and both the enemy and ourselves just bow down and bow! The secrets of the world rushed to be opened to him, and he finally solved the crisis of annihilation.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: Tunshi Xingkong Juchang Ban: Xueluo Dalu
吞噬星空剧场版 血洛大陆
Swallowed Star The Movie: Xueluo Continent

data.title: Tunshi Xingkong Movie: Xueluo Dalu
data.title_english: Swallowed Star The Movie: Xueluo Continent
data.title_japanese: 吞噬星空剧场版 血洛大陆
title_synonyms: Tunshi Xingkong Juchang Ban: Xueluo Dalu
data.synopsis:
It's time for battle! It's time for excitement! It's time for thrills! "This trial has a 98% mortality rate." "Then... I'll eliminate everyone who threatens my life." Luo Feng travels to the Blood Continent for the trial to protect Earth. On this continent, he constantly pushes his limits, makes good friends and encounters powerful enemies, but he never retreats. Instead, he perseveres step by step, carrying the burden of his journey. Ultimately, he completes his infinite advancement, gaining the powerful ability to protect Earth.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Decapolice
data.synopsis:
DECASIM, a virtual world created from a perfect copy of reality. More than just a simulation, it's a complete copy of a real city, a forbidden place where memories of every past crime lie dormant. "Clues" found in DECASIM can help unravel the riddles of the real world.

(Source: Official site)

data.title: Jeil Pap
data.synopsis: A stop-motion commercial for Jeil Pharmaceuticals to commemorate the 40th anniversary of the Jeil Pap pain relief patch, featuring the penguin mascot used to advertise the product in the 80s.

data.title: Man Huang Xian Jie
data.synopsis:
In the vast and wild fairyland, the culture of cultivating immortals prevails, and mortals are proud to become cultivators. College student, Lu Hangzhi,  transmigrated from the modern times and became a mortal servant in Ziyun Town. 

He lived a life of treading on thin ice every day, but he refused to accept his fate and worked hard to get rid of his status quo and strived to get ahead. Later, because of a good deed, he was appreciated by Zhu Fuqin, the eldest lady of the Zhu Mansion, and his senior brother Leng Wuya. 

With unremitting efforts, he passed many tests and joined the Xuanxin Sect. He was promoted from an outer disciple to an inner disciple, and was even favored by the deputy head Chen Ji and took him in. He cut his way through obstacles and moved forward on the road of cultivating immortals. 

(source: Qiyi)

data.title: Mushen Ji
data.synopsis:
In the Disabled Elderly Village, there live nine elderly people with unpredictable origins and the young man Qin Mu they raised. One day, the cows that Qin Mu was responsible for grazing began to speak human words. From then on, Qin Mu became more aware of the dangers and beauty of Daxu, a land abandoned by gods: demons descended with darkness, divine bones danced in the ruins, and dragon bones protected their young, a giant ship that drags the sun... No matter what kind of danger he faces, Qin Mu is fearless. He has integrated the skills passed down by the Nine Elders and vowed to carve out a world with his unparalleled hegemony. 

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Zhai Zhu's (宅猪) web novel of the same title.

titles.title: Kizu darake Seijo yori Houfuku wo Komete
The Holy Wound Became a Villain Vengeance from a Saint Full of Wounds
傷だらけ聖女より報復をこめて
With Vengeance, Sincerely, Your Broken Saintess

data.title: Kizu darake Seijo yori Houfuku wo Komete
data.title_english: With Vengeance, Sincerely, Your Broken Saintess
data.title_japanese: 傷だらけ聖女より報復をこめて
title_synonyms: The Holy Wound Became a Villain Vengeance from a Saint Full of Wounds
data.synopsis:
Several centuries ago, a plague ravaged the Kingdom of Geed until a girl with healing powers appeared and saved the nation. Today, she is revered as the goddess Lushe, and a temple in her honor gathers individuals with similar powers to serve the kingdom as so-called saintesses.

Lua Restoatt is a saintess candidate, but her power is defective—she heals by transferring others' injuries to herself, which earned her the nickname "Broken Saintess." This flawed ability nearly kills her when she rushes to save Garrett Vance, a knight captain she admires. But Lua's best friend, Arianne Trebias, takes the credit and becomes engaged to Garrett.

Crushed by the betrayal, Lua vows never to heal again and prioritizes her secret second ability: inflicting others with the ailments she once absorbed. After witnessing this, Second Prince Sven Geed Crone approaches Lua and offers an alliance. Hungry for revenge, the once-timid Lua accepts Sven's proposal, ready to strike back at those who have wronged her and help the prince expose dark secrets of the temple.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
